title: usePageAgent hook — page-agent v1.7.1 integration with execute() API
evidence: Uses real page-agent v1.7.1 API: execute(task) -> ExecutionResult, dispose()
page-agent dynamically imported to keep bundle lean when chat is disabled
zod statically imported for build-time Zod schema construction
customTools built from AGENT_ACTIONS with Zod inputSchema
History events with type='step' extracted for action annotations
initialize() returns early if isReady=true (session-static prompt)
notes: Rewrote plan's init()/sendMessage()/destroy() assumptions to use actual execute()/dispose() API.
